executiveSummary.text: Bank of Ireland Group plc (BIRG) is now back in sync with the canonical DYOR HQ sheet after the metadata repair pass. The current stance is REDUCE with conviction 50/100, using $16.45 as the latest stored price reference where available.

businessModel.text: Bank of Ireland Group plc is a banking franchise exposed to deposit gathering, lending margins, credit quality and capital return discipline. The rebuilt note keeps the company mapping and headline stance coherent while fuller bank-specific analysis is refreshed.

recentCatalysts.text: Key swing factors for Bank of Ireland Group plc remain net interest income, deposit pricing, impairment trends and capital return updates. Any change in domestic credit quality or rates can move the earnings outlook quickly.

thesisEvaluation.text: Base case: the core operating backdrop remains good enough to support the present reduce stance, but not strong enough to justify a looser risk view without better evidence. Bull case: execution and demand improve faster than expected. Bear case: operating or funding pressure worsens and compresses valuation further.

keyRisks.text: Margin pressure if rates fall faster than deposit costs reprice. Credit losses can rise if the domestic economy weakens. Regulatory capital requirements can cap distributions. Competitive deposit pricing can erode franchise economics. Sentiment can swing sharply around macro and policy updates.

risks.risk: Margin pressure if rates fall faster than deposit costs reprice.
Credit losses can rise if the domestic economy weakens.
Regulatory capital requirements can cap distributions.
Competitive deposit pricing can erode franchise economics.
Sentiment can swing sharply around macro and policy updates.

whoShouldOwn.text: Own: Income and value investors who understand bank-cycle volatility. Avoid: Investors seeking structural growth or low macro sensitivity.

recommendation.text: REDUCE - Conviction: 50/100. This rebuilt page is intentionally concise, but it is now internally coherent and aligned to the corrected ticker and company metadata.

entryExit.text: Keep position sizing consistent with a reduce stance until fuller company-specific analysis is refreshed.
